title: pityrogramma microphylla
intro: Pityrogramma microphylla, also known as the Pityrogramma or Ladyfern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pityrogramma microphylla include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Pityrogramma microphylla is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for use in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
